audience_policies.source_phrase: Admits 6 people at $9 per adult and $6 per child. Kids under age 2 are free. Valid for general daytime admission to Franklin Park Zoo or Stone Zoo only. No reservations required. Library passes are not valid for Boston Lights or ZooLights.
